title: Close legacy vector document schema
description: legacy_document allows extra top-level fields, empty vectors, and mixed vector families despite the one-kind-per-file contract. Add mutually exclusive document branches, minItems, and additionalProperties false.
close_reason: Closed legacy_document: added document_base + 10 strict *_document (oneOf branches with additionalProperties:false, required format_version/description/vectors+minItems:1, specific vector items); removed legacy_full_sync_unknown_nonce vector+schema conditional; added format_version to schnorr48.json; regenerated corpus; schema+vector tests 10/10 + 131 passed. Files: test/vectors/schema.json, test/vectors/generate.py, test/vectors/schnorr48.json, test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json (via regen).
